name: AudioFix
description: Manage audio devices, switch defaults, control volume, and diagnose audio issues on Windows.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List audio devices (speakers, headphones, microphones). Shows device names, IDs, current default, and state.

tools.name: get_default_device
tools.description: Get the current default audio device for output (speakers) or input (microphone).

tools.name: set_default_device
tools.description: Change the default audio device. Use list_devices first to find the device ID.

tools.name: test_device
tools.description: Test an audio device. Type 'tone' plays a test sound on speakers. Type 'mic' monitors microphone input level.

tools.name: get_volume
tools.description: Get the current volume level and mute state for output or input.

tools.name: set_volume
tools.description: Set volume level (0-100) and/or mute state for output or input.

tools.name: toggle_device
tools.description: Enable or disable an audio device. Requires administrator privileges. Disabling unused devices prevents unexpected audio switching.

tools.name: diagnose
tools.description: Run a full audio diagnostic. Checks all devices, volume, mute state, and identifies common issues.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: List audio devices (speakers, headphones, microphones). Shows device names, IDs, current default, and state.

tools.name: get_default_device
tools.description: Get the current default audio device for output (speakers) or input (microphone).

tools.name: set_default_device
tools.description: Change the default audio device. Use list_devices first to find the device ID.

deviceId.description: The device ID to set as default

tools.name: test_device
tools.description: Test an audio device. Type 'tone' plays a test sound on speakers. Type 'mic' monitors microphone input level.

durationSeconds.description: Duration in seconds for mic test (1-10)

tools.name: get_volume
tools.description: Get the current volume level and mute state for output or input.

tools.name: set_volume
tools.description: Set volume level (0-100) and/or mute state for output or input.

muted.description: true to mute, false to unmute

tools.name: toggle_device
tools.description: Enable or disable an audio device. Requires administrator privileges — the user will see a Windows security prompt if not already elevated. Disabling unused devices prevents unexpected audio switching.

enabled.description: true to enable, false to disable

tools.name: diagnose
tools.description: Run a full audio diagnostic. Checks all devices, volume, mute state, and identifies common issues like too many active devices, Stereo Mix enabled, or low volume.
